author: Toei Animation
text:
Who is Cure Éclair? | Star Detective Precure! | Episode 22 Trailer | Second Candidate, Shiruku Ieiri
Star Detective Precure! Official Next Episode 22 trailer: Who is Cure Eclair? First Candidate, Shiruku Ieiri

Who is Cure Eclair? There are four candidates...
Let’s deduce who Cure Eclair is and cast your vote! 
Voting starts on Sunday, June 21, on the special website!

Starting with Episode 21, the long-awaited Cure Éclair Arc finally begins!
Watch closely all four episodes from Episode 21 (June 21) through Episode 24 (July 12), and let’s work together to deduce who Cure Éclair will be before Episode 25!

Once you’ve deduced who Cure Eclair might be, be sure to cast your vote on the official campaign website! We’d also love for you to share your theories on social media using the hashtag #WhoIsCureEclair.

Voting Period:
Sunday, June 21, 2026, 8:00 AM JST – Sunday, July 19, 2026, 8:00 AM JST

Voting Page:
Official website special campaign page (one vote per day)
https://www.toei-anim.co.jp/tv/precur...

Watch the latest episode of the new series, simulcasting every Saturday on Crunchyroll!

Watch on Crunchyroll: https://bit.ly/41TqPvR

#StarDetectivePrecure #Precure #Anime

author: Toei Animation
text:
ONE PIECE HEROINES | Official Trailer
Introducing "ONE PIECE HEROINES," a special anime episode celebrating the charm of the heroines of ONE PIECE. 🏴‍☠️👠

📺Broadcasting in Japan on July 5, 2026, at 11:15 p.m.

◆ Synopsis
After buying a pair of shoes that end up hurting her feet, Nami returns to the shop feeling dissatisfied.
There, she meets Lebno, the designer, who tells her, “I’ll make you a brand-new pair from scratch—but only if you’ll be my model.”
The shoes are crafted by the artisan Miucha, leading to an unexpected and stylish encounter.

◆ About the series
ONE PIECE HEROINES is an anime that showcases the charm of the heroines of ONE PIECE through stories not told in the main series.
Based on the novel series ONE PIECE novel HEROINES, originally featured in ONE PIECE magazine, the episode “Episode: NAMI” is being adapted into anime form.

Set in the world of the main story and featuring familiar characters such as Robin, a brand-new story unfolds.

◆ Theme Song
"Blue Shining Star" By AiNA THE END

◆ Staff
Director: Haruka Kamatani
Character Design /Animation Director: Takashi Kojima
Screenplay: Momoka Toyoda
Music: Alisa Okehazama

◆ Voice
Nami:  Akemi Okamura
Robin: Yuriko Yamaguchi
Miucha: Maaya Sakamoto
Lebno: Takehito Koyasu

#ONEPIECE #HEROINES #Trailer #Anime #Nami #Robin
